title: Create features.py — time-domain and frequency-domain feature extraction
acceptance_criteria: Accepts windowed data (windows x channels) from windowing.py
Extracts time-domain features per window: mean, std, min, max, rms, skewness, kurtosis, zero-crossing rate, signal magnitude area
Extracts frequency-domain features per window: FFT peak frequency, spectral energy, spectral entropy, dominant frequency band ratios
Returns feature matrix of shape (num_windows, num_features) with meaningful column names
Feature engineering is vectorized (no per-window Python loops where avoidable)
